title: Don Quixote
author: Miguel de Cervantes
description: An aging nobleman becomes obsessed with chivalric tales and sets out on a series of comical adventures, blurring the line between fantasy and reality.

title: War and Peace
author: Leo Tolstoy
description: Set during the Napoleonic Wars, this epic novel follows several Russian families as they navigate love, loss, war, and personal growth.

title: The Odyssey
author: Homer
description: The hero Odysseus embarks on a perilous journey home after the Trojan War, encountering monsters, gods, and countless obstacles.

title: Pride and Prejudice
author: Jane Austen
description: Elizabeth Bennet and Mr. Darcy overcome misunderstandings, pride, and social expectations in one of literature's most beloved love stories.

author: George Orwell
description: In a totalitarian society where every action is monitored, Winston Smith struggles to preserve truth, freedom, and individuality.

title: To Kill a Mockingbird
author: Harper Lee
description: Through the eyes of young Scout Finch, the novel explores racial injustice, morality, and compassion in the American South.
